message:
feat(ffs-block): add CacheMetrics instrumentation surface (bd-ece)

Expose hit/miss/eviction counters and ARC list sizes via a frozen
point-in-time CacheMetrics snapshot. Also fixes an uncounted eviction
path in replace() where T1 entries were removed without incrementing
the eviction counter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
